steps.t: Naffa has asked you to talk to Welduth Lhush, a Stoor reputed to have the best daffodils and the festival, and ask her if you can trade for some bulbs…
Welduth agreed to trade some daffodil bulbs in exchange for Gloron Magimrud's secret to growing carrots. You should talk to Gloron Magimrud in the far…
Gloron has told you that he will give you the secret to his high-quality carrots if you get a daffodil banner and place it by the barn. You should tal…
Mayor Malmadog has given you a daffodil banner. You should place it in the ground in front of the large barn by Clegur's farming fields.
You have placed a daffodil banner in front of the barn, as Gloron Magimrud asked. You should talk to Gloron, still in the fields.
Gloron Magimrud has shared his secret to growing good carrots with you. You should return to Welduth Lhush in front of her home in Clegur and tell her…
Welduth Lhush has relented and said you can take the pot of her prized daffodil bulbs to her left. You should collect the bulbs so you can give them t…
You have gotten some daffodil bulbs from Welduth Lhush. You should bring them to Naffa Blodven near Clegur's stable-master.
